<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Download NZB file for queue item"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/queue/{id}/download"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Downloads the original NZB file associated with a queue item
